mapper.sql: select t1.setting_id, t1.dept_id,dpt.dept_name, t1.opt_date, t1.status, t1.goods_count, t1.adjust_count, t1.last_modify_time from store_price_setting t1 left join sys_dept dpt on dpt.dept_id = t1.dept_id

select t1.setting_id as setting_id, t1.dept_id as dept_id,dpt.dept_name , t1.opt_date as opt_date, t1.status as status,t1.submit_status as submit_status, ifnull(t4.goods_count,0) as goods_count, ifnull(t4.adjust_count,0) as adjust_count, t1.last_modify_time as last_modify_time from store_price_setting t1 left join (select count(distinct(t2.quotation_id)) as adjust_count,count(t3.goods_id) as goods_count ,t2.dept_id from store_goods_quotation t2 left join store_goods_quotation_goods t3 on t2.quotation_id=t3.quotation_id where t2.status=1 and t3.status!=0 group by dept_id ) as t4 on t1.dept_id = t4.dept_id left join sys_dept dpt on dpt.dept_id = t1.dept_id

select count(distinct(t2.quotation_id)) as adjust_count,count(t3.goods_id) as goods_count ,t2.dept_id from store_goods_quotation t2 left join store_goods_quotation_goods t3 on t2.quotation_id=t3.quotation_id
mapper.insert:
insert into store_price_setting
dept_id, opt_date, status, goods_count, adjust_count, last_modify_time,
#{deptId}, #{optDate}, #{status}, #{goodsCount}, #{adjustCount}, #{lastModifyTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from store_price_setting where setting_id in
#{settingId}
